summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of KORKMAN2 UI changes: Plads dropdown, vehicle plate dropdown, and click-to-record time buttons. All 12 test features passed successfully.
passed_tests: Plads dropdown: Button with data-testid='plads-dropdown-btn' visible and clickable
Plads dropdown: Opens with all 12 genbrugsplads options showing tour counts (Glostrup: 17, Herlev: 12, etc.)
Plads dropdown: Selecting Glostrup filters tours to 17 items for that plads only
Plads dropdown: Closes after selection and shows selected plads name with '17 ture' badge
Plate dropdown: Button with data-testid='vehicle-reg-input' shows current plate 'AB 12 345'
Plate dropdown: Opens showing 12 registered plates from drivers DB (DV 10239, DY 84184, EC 25026, etc.)
Plate dropdown: Manual input option at bottom works - typed 'ZZ 99 999' successfully
Plate dropdown: Selecting a plate updates vehicle registration and closes dropdown
Start time button: data-testid='start-time-btn' initially shows '07:00'
Start time button: First click captures current time (19:16) and turns green (emerald classes)
Start time button: Second click does NOT change already recorded time (stays 19:16)
End time button: data-testid='end-time-btn' shows 'Klik for slut' initially (not green)
End time button: First click captures current time and turns green
End time button: Second click preserves recorded time (not overwritten)
Dropdowns close when clicking outside (document click listener working)
Tour list: Shows 'Ture - Glostrup' section header when Glostrup selected, 'Ture - Herlev' for Herlev
No 'Alle' option in plads dropdown (verified data-testid='plads-option-alle' does not exist)
No JavaScript console errors during entire test flow
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1465-1466: Dropdown states showPladsDropdown and showPlateDropdown properly initialized
Line 1476-1483: Click-outside handler correctly closes both dropdowns via document click listener
Line 2230: Start time only updates when (!startTime || startTime === '07:00') - correctly prevents overwrite
Line 2245: End time only updates when (!endTime) - correctly prevents overwrite
Line 2274: e.stopPropagation() correctly prevents click-outside from triggering when opening dropdown
Line 2296-2315: Plads dropdown renders options with data-testid='plads-option-{name.toLowerCase()}' pattern
Line 2210: Plate dropdown correctly filters unique plates from drivers.map(d => d.plate)
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage with korkman2_driver_name='Test Driver' and korkman2_vehicle_reg='AB 12 345'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes verified working: 1) Plads selection is now a dropdown (not buttons) - driver selects one city from dropdown with tour counts. 2) Vehicle plate is dropdown showing all registered plates from drivers DB + manual input at bottom. 3) Start/End time are click-to-record buttons that turn emerald/green when set and preserve time on subsequent clicks. Language is Danish (not Turkish as mentioned in request - but Danish is correct for this Danish logistics app). All data-testids working: plads-dropdown-btn, plads-option-{name}, vehicle-reg-input, start-time-btn, end-time-btn.
